items.title: This tiny new 45W power bank with built-in USB-C lanyard cable, display, more is just $25 today
items.summary:
Baseus PicoGo AC22 Mini 10,000mAh power bank with built-in USB-C cable

Buy for $25 (Reg. $40)

Apply WF85PJ7Z during checkout.

What we love

This compact Baseus power bank packs a sizeable 10,000mAh battery, giving you enough juice to comfortably recharge your phone while away from an outlet. It comes in a small, travel-friendly design that’s easy to toss into a bag or pocket, and it comes with a built-in USB-C cable that also doubles as a convenient carry loop/lanyard. The integrated cable supports up to 45W charging output, and there’s also an additional USB-C port onboard, alongside a display to show you the remaining charge.
